title: The Restored Fighters Flood the Port
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the restored fighters flood the port, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Usopp, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as after Sugar's defeat, the restored fighters and citizens flood Dressrosa with confusion while Usopp becomes the unlikely hero who broke the country's hidden curse.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Shut up!!! Usoland wouldn't lie to us!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am the Descendant of the Hero Norland!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He promised that if anything went wrong, he would always be here to save us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Our hero would never deceive us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If you insult usoland any more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We won't let you get away with it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I hope you're ready for what's coming to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: That's the sound of a dying tontatta...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's right!! Usoland will make sure the SOP operation succeeds, no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's right....!! You're the ones who should be afraid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: beheheh!! Then call for him, why don't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: How can you keep on trusting in me like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: He's right about every- thing!! I was lying all along!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm the fearsome sniper of the straw hat crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: My name is USOPP!!! I'm a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You're a pirate...but...but still a hero, right??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I just told you, I'm no hero!! A pirate is a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Don't make me repeat myself!! I was just tricking you all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: But you just had to keep on believing me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: ...So what, you came back here just to admit to your lie?! Behehehehehehehehehehehehehe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: If I didn't, these idiots would keep on waiting for me until they were all dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I don't know how I'd sleep at night knowing that, so I figured as thanks for believing in me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: ...I might as well go out fighting like a man instead!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: My name is usOPP!!! And don't you dare forget it, Tontatta!! If I die here today, you'd better put up a statue of me next to Norland!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: From this moment on, I'm going to become your "legendary Hero"!!!

summary: The Restored Fighters Flood the Port develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Usopp, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
